features.name: Map and WeakMap upsert
features.description: Adds getOrInsert() and getOrInsertComputed() to Map and WeakMap for retrieving an existing value or inserting a default value when the key is missing.

features.name: JSON.parse source text access
features.description: Extends JSON.parse() reviver callbacks with source-text context and adds raw JSON support for lossless JSON round-tripping.

features.name: Iterator.concat()
features.description: Adds Iterator.concat() for creating a lazy iterator that yields values from multiple iterable inputs in sequence.

features.name: Uint8Array base64 and hex conversion
features.description: Adds Uint8Array methods for converting binary data to and from base64 and hex strings.

features.name: Math.sumPrecise()
features.description: Adds Math.sumPrecise(), which sums an iterable of numbers using a more accurate algorithm than naive repeated addition.

features.name: Error.isError()
features.description: Adds Error.isError() for branded Error checks that work more reliably across realms than instanceof Error.

features.name: Array.fromAsync()
features.description: Adds Array.fromAsync(), an async counterpart to Array.from() that creates an array from async iterables, sync iterables, or array-like values.

features.name: RegExp.escape()
features.description: Escapes a string so it can be safely used as a literal pattern fragment inside a RegExp.

features.name: Redeclarable global eval-introduced vars
features.description: Allows certain global var declarations introduced by eval to be redeclared in ways aligned with web reality.

features.name: Float16Array, DataView float16, and Math.f16round()
features.description: Adds half-precision 16-bit floating-point typed arrays, DataView accessors, and Math.f16round().

features.name: Promise.try()
features.description: Starts a promise chain from a callback, converting synchronous throws and returned values into Promise outcomes.

features.name: Iterator helpers
features.description: Adds helper methods to sync iterators, including map, filter, take, drop, flatMap, reduce, toArray, forEach, some, every, find, and Iterator.from().

features.name: JSON modules
features.description: Allows importing JSON as modules, normally via import attributes.

features.name: Import attributes
features.description: Adds import attributes syntax such as import data from './x.json' with { type: 'json' }.

features.name: RegExp modifiers
features.description: Adds inline regular-expression modifiers for locally enabling or disabling flags within part of a pattern.

features.name: New Set methods
features.description: Adds Set composition and relation methods: union, intersection, difference, symmetricDifference, isSubsetOf, isSupersetOf, and isDisjointFrom.

features.name: Duplicate named capture groups
features.description: Allows duplicate RegExp named capture groups when they are in different disjunction alternatives.

features.name: ArrayBuffer transfer
features.description: Adds ArrayBuffer transfer and transferToFixedLength for moving buffer contents and detaching the original.

features.name: Promise.withResolvers()
features.description: Creates a Promise together with its resolve and reject functions.

features.name: Array grouping
features.description: Adds Object.groupBy() and Map.groupBy() for grouping iterable items.

features.name: Resizable and growable ArrayBuffers
features.description: Adds resizable ArrayBuffer and growable SharedArrayBuffer capabilities.

features.name: RegExp /v flag with set notation and properties of strings
features.description: Adds Unicode set notation, set operations, nested classes, and string properties through the RegExp v flag.

features.name: Atomics.waitAsync()
features.description: Asynchronously waits for shared memory changes without blocking the agent.

features.name: Well-formed Unicode strings
features.description: Adds String.prototype.isWellFormed() and String.prototype.toWellFormed() for handling lone surrogate code units.

features.name: Change Array by Copy
features.description: Adds non-mutating copy-returning methods such as toReversed, toSorted, toSpliced, and with.

features.name: Symbols as WeakMap keys
features.description: Allows non-registered Symbols to be used as keys in WeakMap, WeakSet, WeakRef, and FinalizationRegistry.

features.name: Hashbang grammar
features.description: Allows scripts and modules to start with a Unix-style hashbang comment.

features.name: Array find from last
features.description: Adds findLast() and findLastIndex() to Array and typed arrays.

features.name: Error cause
features.description: Adds the cause option to Error constructors for preserving lower-level error context.

features.name: Class static initialization blocks
features.description: Adds static blocks for executing class-level initialization logic with access to private state.

features.name: Object.hasOwn()
features.description: Adds Object.hasOwn() as a safer static alternative to Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call().

features.name: .at()
features.description: Adds at() for relative indexing on Array, typed arrays, and String.

features.name: Ergonomic brand checks for private fields
features.description: Adds private-field brand checks using the #x in obj syntax.

features.name: Top-level await
features.description: Allows await at the top level of ECMAScript modules.

features.name: RegExp match indices
features.description: Adds the RegExp d flag and match .indices result data.

features.name: Class fields
features.description: Standardizes public instance fields, private instance fields, private methods/accessors, static fields, and private static methods.

features.name: Numeric separators
features.description: Allows underscores as separators in numeric literals for readability.

features.name: Logical assignment operators
features.description: Adds &&=, ||=, and ??= compound logical assignment operators.

features.name: WeakRef and FinalizationRegistry
features.description: Adds WeakRef and FinalizationRegistry for weakly referencing objects and observing cleanup.

features.name: Promise.any() and AggregateError
features.description: Adds Promise.any() and AggregateError for resolving with the first fulfilled promise.

features.name: String.prototype.replaceAll()
features.description: Adds replaceAll() for replacing all string or RegExp matches.

features.name: import.meta
features.description: Adds the import.meta meta-property for module metadata such as import.meta.url.

features.name: Nullish coalescing operator
features.description: Adds ?? for choosing a fallback only when the left side is null or undefined.

features.name: Optional chaining
features.description: Adds ?. for safely accessing nested properties, calls, and elements.

features.name: for-in mechanics
features.description: Specifies for-in property enumeration order and behavior more precisely.

features.name: globalThis
features.description: Adds globalThis as a standard way to reference the global object.

features.name: Promise.allSettled()
features.description: Adds Promise.allSettled() for waiting for all promises to settle without short-circuiting on rejection.

features.name: BigInt
features.description: Adds arbitrary-precision integer values through the BigInt primitive and BigInt object.

features.name: Dynamic import()
features.description: Adds import() for asynchronously loading modules from expressions.

features.name: String.prototype.matchAll()
features.description: Adds matchAll() for iterating over all RegExp matches including capture groups.

features.name: Array.prototype.flat() and flatMap()
features.description: Adds flat() for flattening nested arrays and flatMap() for map followed by one-level flatten.

features.name: String.prototype.trimStart() and trimEnd()
features.description: Adds trimStart() and trimEnd() for removing leading or trailing whitespace.

features.name: Well-formed JSON.stringify()
features.description: Requires JSON.stringify() to escape lone surrogates so its output is well-formed Unicode.

features.name: Object.fromEntries()
features.description: Creates an object from iterable key-value entries.

features.name: Function.prototype.toString revision
features.description: Requires Function.prototype.toString() to return source text slices more precisely where available.

features.name: Symbol.prototype.description
features.description: Adds the description accessor for retrieving a Symbol description.

features.name: JSON superset
features.description: Allows U+2028 and U+2029 line separator characters in JavaScript string literals, aligning with JSON.

features.name: Optional catch binding
features.description: Allows catch blocks without a binding parameter.

features.name: Asynchronous iteration
features.description: Adds async iterators and for await...of for consuming asynchronous streams of values.

features.name: Promise.prototype.finally()
features.description: Adds finally() callbacks that run after promise fulfillment or rejection.

features.name: RegExp Unicode property escapes
features.description: Adds Unicode property escapes such as \p{Script=Greek} and \P{...}.

features.name: RegExp lookbehind assertions
features.description: Adds positive and negative lookbehind assertions.

features.name: Object rest/spread properties
features.description: Adds object spread and rest syntax for object literals and destructuring.

features.name: RegExp named capture groups
features.description: Adds named capture groups and named backreferences.

features.name: RegExp dotAll s flag
features.description: Adds the s flag so . matches line terminator characters.

features.name: Template literal revision
features.description: Lifts restrictions on escape sequences in tagged template literals.

features.name: Shared memory and atomics
features.description: Adds SharedArrayBuffer and Atomics for shared-memory concurrency.

features.name: Async functions
features.description: Adds async function declarations, expressions, methods, and await inside async functions.

features.name: Trailing commas in function parameter lists and calls
features.description: Allows trailing commas in function parameter lists and function calls.

features.name: Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors()
features.description: Returns all own property descriptors of an object.

features.name: String padding
features.description: Adds padStart() and padEnd() for padding strings to a target length.

features.name: Object.values() and Object.entries()
features.description: Returns own enumerable string-keyed property values or key-value entries.

features.name: Exponentiation operator
features.description: Adds the ** and **= exponentiation operators.

features.name: Array.prototype.includes()
features.description: Adds includes() for checking whether an array contains a value using SameValueZero equality.
